title: pouteria glabrescens
intro: Pouteria glabrescens, also known as the 'African pouteria' or 'camiguin pouteria', is a species of plant in the family Sapotaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, with its bark and roots used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing several health benefits such as reducing fever and treating wounds. Pouteria glabrescens can be prepared into herbal remedies through decoction, infusion, or tincture, making it a valuable resource in folk medicine.
